guard_summary.scope: Entity-only identity127 prep; no route, corridor, project, claim, source, or relation records included.
guard_summary.existing_overrides: Inspected data/identity-overrides/merges.json in durable alias_id -> target_id shape under .aliases.entity; aliases already present there were excluded.
guard_summary.prior_batches: Inspected visible data/review_notes/codex-identity-batch*-prep.json files through identity126 and applied cleanup audit rows for identity124-identity126. Proposed alias ids were checked absent from prior entity prep/application aliases.
guard_summary.do_not_merge: Checked data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json .pairs.entity for each proposed alias/target pair; no proposed pair was present.
guard_summary.conservative_exclusions: Excluded role/person, committee/member, agency/subunit, office/person, cross-borough community-board, and source-time false-friend candidates. Specifically excluded the role-shaped NYSDOT candidate entity_ny-state-dot because its display name is Commissioner of Transportation despite an NYSDOT payload.
guard_summary.confidence_rule: All included proposals use confidence=high and require exact durable entity name/acronym or same numbered community board with same borough and source-family context.
